occurrence_sentence: A great example of this is the [Echo-5Q system that was launched by Formfactor Inc.](https://www.formfactor.com/press-release/formfactor-tabor-electronics-and-quantware-join-forces-to-deliver-a-full-stack-5-qubit-quantum-computer) this week. It vastly outperforms competing systems in that category, at a price point of under $1M, and is powered by QuantWare's _Soprano-D_.

A great example of this is the [Echo-5Q system that was launched by Formfactor Inc.](https://www.formfactor.com/press-release/formfactor-tabor-electronics-and-quantware-join-forces-to-deliver-a-full-stack-5-qubit-quantum-computer) this week.
